agents.title: Team Members
agents.description: Manage team members who can handle conversations on this channel

noAgents.title: No team members found
noAgents.description: There are no team members available at the moment. Please add team members first.

autoAssignment.title: Auto Assignment
autoAssignment.description: Configure how conversations are automatically assigned to team members

enable.label: Enable auto assignment
enable.description: New conversations will be automatically assigned to available team members

maxLimit.title: Maximum Conversations Limit
maxLimit.label: Maximum conversations per team member
maxLimit.help: Maximum number of conversations an team member can have simultaneously

info.title: Important Information:
info.point1: Auto assignment distributes conversations among available team members
info.point2: Considers each team member's current workload
info.point3: Offline team members don't receive new conversations automatically
info.point4: You can set maximum conversation limit per team member

validation.limitPositive: Limit must be a positive number

validation.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one team member

businessHours.title: Business Hours
businessHours.description: Configure the hours when your team is available

enable.label: Enable business hours
enable.description: Auto-reply will be sent outside business hours

unavailableMessage.label: Unavailability Message
unavailableMessage.help: This message will be sent when outside business hours

validation.hasErrors: There are errors in the schedules

info.title: Important Information:
info.point1: Hours are based on the selected timezone
info.point2: Messages received outside hours will receive auto-reply
info.point3: Team Members can still respond manually outside hours
info.point4: Settings apply only to this channel

disabled.title: Business Hours Disabled
disabled.description: Business hours are disabled. All messages will be processed normally.

csat.title: Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) Survey
csat.description: Configure satisfaction surveys to collect customer feedback

displayType.label: Display Type
displayType.help: How the survey will be presented to the customer

message.label: Survey Message
message.placeholder: How would you rate our service?
message.help: Message that will be displayed along with the survey

surveyRules.label: Survey Rules
surveyRules.description1: The survey will be sent automatically when:
surveyRules.description2: Only conversations with these labels will receive the survey:
surveyRules.noLabelsSelected: No labels selected - survey will be sent for all conversations

csat.noTriggers: No triggers configured. Add a trigger to get started.
csat.allTriggersAdded: All trigger types have been added

stageTrigger.label: Pipeline Stage Trigger
stageTrigger.noStagesAvailable: No stages available for this pipeline

regexTrigger.label: Regex Pattern Trigger
regexTrigger.help: Regular expression pattern to match against message content

inactivityTrigger.label: Inactivity Trigger
inactivityTrigger.help: Trigger CSAT survey after conversation is inactive for specified minutes

info.title: How it works:
info.point1: Survey is sent automatically after conversation resolution
info.point2: Customers can rate from 1 to 5 stars
info.point3: Responses are stored for later analysis
info.point4: CSAT reports are available in the reports section

disabled.title: CSAT Disabled
disabled.description: Customer satisfaction survey is disabled for this channel.

agentBotConfiguration.title: AI Agent Configuration
agentBotConfiguration.description: Configure AI agents to automate responses

noBots.title: No AI Agents Available
noBots.description: You don't have any AI agents configured for this channel yet.

info.title: How It Works:
info.point1: AI agents can automatically respond to customer messages
info.point3: AI agents can transfer conversations to human agents
info.point4: AI agent performance statistics are available

advanced.title: Advanced Configuration
advanced.description: Configure advanced AI agent settings and behaviors

conversationStatus.title: Conversation Status
conversationStatus.description: Select which conversation statuses allow the AI agent to execute. If none are selected, the AI agent will execute for all statuses.
conversationStatus.emptyHint: If no status is selected, the AI agent will execute for all conversation statuses.

labels.title: Labels
labels.description: Select which labels allow the AI agent to execute. If none are selected, the AI agent will execute for all conversations regardless of labels.
labels.emptyHint: If no labels are selected, the AI agent will execute for all conversations regardless of labels.
labels.noLabels: No labels available. Create labels in the Labels section to use this feature.

ignoredLabels.title: Ignored Labels
ignoredLabels.description: Select labels that will prevent the AI agent from responding. Conversations with these labels will be skipped by the AI agent.
ignoredLabels.noAvailableLabels: No available labels to ignore. All labels are either already ignored or in the allowed list.

facebookMessenger.title: Facebook Messenger Configuration
facebookMessenger.description: Configure how the AI agent interacts with direct messages and comments on Facebook
facebookMessenger.enableCommentRepliesDescription: When enabled, the AI agent will respond to comments on Facebook posts
facebookMessenger.commentAgentBotDescription: Select which AI agent should handle comment replies. Choose 'Use Same Agent' to use the main AI agent, or select a different agent specifically for comments.
facebookMessenger.noOtherBots: No other AI agents available. The main AI agent will be used for comments.
facebookMessenger.postSelectionDescription: Choose whether the AI agent should respond to all posts or only specific posts
facebookMessenger.noPostsFound: No posts found. Please check if the Facebook page is properly connected.

moderation.title: Message Moderation
moderation.description: Configure automatic moderation for incoming messages
moderation.enableModerationDescription: When enabled, messages will be automatically filtered and moderated before responses are sent

explicitWords.title: Explicit Words Filter
explicitWords.description: Enter words or regex patterns (one per line) to filter explicit content. Messages containing these words will be flagged for moderation.
explicitWords.placeholder:
Enter words or regex patterns, one per line
e.g.:
badword
\bprofanity\b
^spam

sentimentAnalysis.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentimentAnalysis.description: Use AI to detect offensive or inappropriate messages. Messages flagged as offensive will be sent to moderation.

autoApproveResponses.title: Auto-Approve Responses
autoApproveResponses.description: When enabled, AI-generated responses will be sent automatically without requiring approval. When disabled, all responses must be approved before being sent.

autoRejectExplicitWords.title: Auto-Reject - Explicit Words
autoRejectExplicitWords.description: When enabled, messages containing explicit words will be automatically rejected and deleted without requiring manual approval.

autoRejectOffensiveSentiment.title: Auto-Reject - Offensive Sentiment
autoRejectOffensiveSentiment.description: When enabled, messages detected as offensive by sentiment analysis will be automatically rejected and deleted without requiring manual approval.

validation.selectBot: Select an AI agent before continuing

lockToSingleConversation.title: Lock to Single Conversation
lockToSingleConversation.description: Limit customer to one active conversation at a time

enable.label: Enable single conversation lock
enable.description: When enabled, customers can only have one active conversation. New messages reopen the same conversation instead of creating new ones.

enabled.title: When Enabled
enabled.description: Customers will always reuse the same conversation. Ideal for continuous support contexts.

disabled.title: When Disabled
disabled.description: New conversations can be created freely. Ideal for transactional or multi-topic support.

recommended.title: Recommended
recommended.description: Enable for ongoing support channels. Disable for transactional or multi-department channels.

defaultConversationStatus.title: Default Conversation Status
defaultConversationStatus.description: Set the initial status for new conversations in this channel
defaultConversationStatus.selectDescription: Choose the default status that new conversations will have when created

info.title: How it works:
info.description: If no status is selected, the system will use the default behavior: 'pending' for channels with active bots, 'open' for others. This setting overrides the default behavior.

moderation.title: Comment Moderation
moderation.description: Review and moderate Facebook comments that require approval

empty.title: No moderations found
empty.description: There are no moderation requests matching your filters.

validation.websiteUrlInvalid: Website URL must be a valid URL (e.g: https://mysite.com)
validation.apiKeySidRequired: API Key SID is required when using API Key
validation.phoneInvalidFormat: Phone must be in international format (+5511999999999)

preChatForm.description: Collect visitor information before starting the conversation
preChatForm.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Hello! To better assist you, please complete the information below:
preChatForm.welcomeMessageHelp: This message will be displayed at the top of the pre-chat form.

howItWorks.point1: The form is displayed before the client starts the conversation
howItWorks.point2: Collected information is attached to the contact profile
howItWorks.point3: Required fields must be completed to continue
howItWorks.point4: Use the drag function to reorder fields

preChatForm.disabledDescription: Enable to collect visitor information before starting the conversation.
